source.description: Built-in image generation created a six-panel pencil process contact sheet for the sunglasses-on-a-towel lesson.
source.notes: The contact sheet was reviewed before cropping; the final panel is used as the finished asset.

process_strategy: The six frames keep the same tilted towel and sunglasses pose, introducing the lenses, frame, arms, towel edges, stripes, fringe, and lens shading before the final cleanup pass.

final_elements.name: tilted beach towel
final_elements.description: A soft rectangular towel sits behind the sunglasses at a slight angle.

final_elements.name: two rounded lenses
final_elements.description: Two large rounded sunglass lenses overlap the center of the towel.

final_elements.name: bridge and frame rims
final_elements.description: A narrow bridge connects the lenses, with light rims around both lenses.

final_elements.name: folded sunglass arms
final_elements.description: Both side arms tuck back along the towel behind the lenses.

final_elements.name: towel stripes and fringe
final_elements.description: Simple towel stripes and small fringe marks give the cloth a beach-towel feel.

final_elements.name: dark lens shading
final_elements.description: Soft graphite shading fills the lenses while leaving small highlight gaps.

frames.visible_job: Block in the tilted towel rectangle and two light rounded lens guides.
Add the bridge and rough frame rims around the two lens shapes.
Draw the folded sunglass arms extending behind the lenses along the towel.
Refine the towel edge, add simple stripes, and place the fringe marks.
Add dark lens shading and small reserved highlight gaps without changing the frame.

final_step.visible_job: Darken keeper contours, strengthen the towel texture, and add restrained cast shadows to the existing shapes.

rejection_checks: No major contour, prop, marking, or color choice should first appear in the final image.
No adjacent frame should look unchanged at card size.
The final image must keep the same pose, scale, and placement as the step frames.
